name: vicinae-todo
title: Todo List
description: Manage todos with natural-language quick add, due dates, subtasks and Google Tasks sync.
author: UpayanChatterjee

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.title: Google OAuth Client ID
preferences.description: Client ID of your Google Cloud OAuth 'Desktop app' credential. Leave empty to use the extension without Google Tasks sync.

preferences.name: clientSecret
preferences.title: Google OAuth Client Secret
preferences.description: Client secret of the same Desktop app credential.

preferences.name: listName
preferences.title: Google Tasks List Name
preferences.description: Name of the Google Tasks list to sync with. Created automatically if it doesn't exist.

commands.name: manage-todos
commands.title: Manage Todos
commands.description: View, complete, snooze and organize your todos.

commands.name: add-todo
commands.title: Add Todo
commands.description: Quickly add a todo using natural language, e.g. 'buy milk tomorrow'.
